name: global-score-indexer
description: ERC-8004 agent and reputation subgraph for Global Score Agent (Agent0 import + Goldsky deploys)

scripts.deploy:xlayer: graph deploy erc-8004-agent-xlayer --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:gnosis: graph deploy erc-8004-agent-gnosis --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:optimism: graph deploy erc-8004-agent-optimism --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:olas-base: graph deploy olas-mech-base subgraphs/olas-marketplace/subgraph.base.yaml --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:olas-gnosis: graph deploy olas-mech-gnosis subgraphs/olas-marketplace/subgraph.gnosis.yaml --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:virtual-base: graph deploy virtual-acp-base subgraphs/virtual-marketplace/subgraph.base.yaml --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:8183-base: graph deploy erc-8183-commerce-base subgraphs/erc-8183-commerce/subgraph.base.yaml --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.deploy:8183-bsc: graph deploy erc-8183-commerce-bsc subgraphs/erc-8183-commerce/subgraph.bsc.yaml --node https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/deploy --ipfs https://subgraph.api.ormilabs.com/ipfs --deploy-key %ORMI_DEPLOY_KEY% --version-label v1.0.0
scripts.tag:celo-goldsky: goldsky subgraph tag create erc-8004-agent-celo/1.0.0 -t prod
scripts.tag:xlayer-goldsky: goldsky subgraph tag create erc-8004-agent-xlayer/1.0.0 -t prod
scripts.tag:gnosis-goldsky: goldsky subgraph tag create erc-8004-agent-gnosis/1.0.0 -t prod
